# Brief Template

```markdown
## Business Context
> Strategic rationale for this initiative. Why now? What business drivers or opportunities make this important?

## Customer Context
> Who does this serve? What pain points or jobs-to-be-done does it address?

## Research Findings

### Customer Feedback Summary
> Key themes from customer feedback analysis. Include sources (Canny votes, support tickets, Gong calls, etc.)

### Competitive Landscape
> Relevant competitive insights. How do competitors handle this? What opportunities or gaps exist?

## High-Level Scope
> Sub-features and their intended benefits. This is directional, not detailed requirements.

- **[Sub-feature 1]**
  - [Benefit/rationale]
  - [Benefit/rationale]
- **[Sub-feature 2]**
  - [Benefit/rationale]

## Success Indicators
> How will we know this initiative succeeded? Metrics, outcomes, or qualitative signals.

## Constraints & Considerations
> Timeline drivers, technical constraints, dependencies, or other factors to consider during scoping.

## Inspiration
> Links, images, mockups, examples, or references that inform the vision.
```
